c-suite_officer: Malhar Shah, Co-founder and Chief Executive Officer
Neha Shah, Co-founder and Chief Technology Officer
Mike Saurbaugh, Director, Security Ecosystem and Solutions, US South East
exact_hq_location: 3031 Tisch Way, STE 602, San Jose, CA 95128, USA
industry_and_segment: Information Technology & Services, specializing in Data Analytics, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, Observability, DevOps, and Cloud Solutions
key_positioning: AI-first product engineering and technology solutions provider that accelerates clients' success in a rapidly evolving technology landscape, focusing on data and AI-driven technology solutions for enterprises and technology innovators in Cybersecurity and Observability.
revenue_model: Service-based/project-based (professional and managed IT services, product engineering)

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Clients struggling with transitioning to a silicon-based workforce and managing extensive tool sprawl in cybersecurity and observability domains.
effect: Increases complexity in clients' digital ecosystems.
Leads to inefficiencies in security and IT operations.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Many enterprises piloting AI but failing to move it successfully into production environments.
effect: Limits ROI from AI investments.
Creates a gap between AI potential and actual implementation.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) are overwhelmed by alert fatigue and rising Mean Time To Respond (MTTR).
effect: Degrades security posture and increases risk of breaches.
Leads to operational inefficiency and burnout for security teams.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Enterprise AI adoption challenges include integration complexity, data governance issues, and scaling proofs-of-concept to production.
effect: Hinders AI implementation and value realization.
Increases costs and time-to-market for AI initiatives.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Systemic lack of skilled cybersecurity professionals to manage increasingly complex security systems.
effect: Exacerbates cybersecurity risks for organizations.
Increases demand for specialized professional services.
Delivers intelligent, scalable, and secure solutions leveraging AI-driven automation.
Reduces migration times by up to 55-60% using AI-infused automation.
Ensures zero-disruption and faster time-to-value for clients.
Leverages alliances with AWS, Google, ServiceNow, Datadog, Dynatrace, and Microsoft for comprehensive solutions.
Successfully delivered 5,000+ projects and processed 10+ TB/day across 150+ data sources for 175+ global customers.
Provides end-to-end support from strategy to managed operations, reducing client operational burden.

differentiators.feature: Deep Domain Expertise in Cybersecurity & Observability
effect: Develops comprehensive integrations and provides actionable insights for rapid issue resolution.

other_crucial_details: Comprised of over 1,000 talented professionals globally.
Focuses on reducing operational overhead, accelerating time-to-value, and improving system reliability without disrupting business continuity.
Leadership includes Co-founder and CEO Malhar Shah, and Co-founder and CTO Neha Shah, both with over 25 years of enterprise technology leadership experience.
Specializes in product engineering and implementation services across cloud, security, observability, and data.

strategic_moves.move: Rebranded from Crest Data Systems to Crest Data and adopted 'crestdata.ai' domain.
effect: Sharpened focus on data and advanced AI technologies.
Positioned as an AI-first product engineering provider.

strategic_moves.move: Strategic participation as a Silver Sponsor at major industry conferences.
effect: Increased brand visibility and engagement with security and observability leaders.
Demonstrated commitment to key technology ecosystems (Datadog, ServiceNow, Dynatrace).

strategic_moves.move: Achieved AWS Cloud Operations Competency and Advanced Tier Services Partner Status.
effect: Validated expertise in cloud operations and migration services for AWS environments.
Strengthened position as a trusted cloud solutions provider.

strategic_moves.move: Joined the Datadog Marketplace and launched a dedicated migration acceleration service.
effect: Expanded reach and offering within the Datadog ecosystem.
Provided specialized services to accelerate Datadog adoption and migration.

strategic_moves.move: Expanded offerings to include Agentic AI solutions and Generative AI services.
effect: Addressed growing enterprise demand for advanced AI capabilities.
Positioned at the forefront of AI innovation in their service areas.

strategic_moves.move: Participated in Netskope's Tech Day Workshop alongside RSA Conference 2026.
effect: Engaged with security executives on cloud security, SASE, and data protection strategies.
Showcased expertise in modernizing security platforms through AI-driven automation.

milestones: Rebranded from Crest Data Systems to Crest Data in May 2024 to signify a sharpened focus on data and advanced AI technologies.
Achieved AWS Advanced Tier Services Partner Status.
Achieved AWS Cloud Operations Competency with Amazon CloudWatch Migration Services.
Recognized as an Advanced Datadog Partner and Marketplace Integration Leader in March 2026.
Successfully delivered over 5,000 projects through AI-driven engineering and intelligent automation.
